description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on pull request open and synchronize events, and on push to the main branch. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, and install Poetry. Then, set up Postgresql and MongoDB, cache Poetry dependencies, install project dependencies, run unit tests with and without Gino using pytest, and upload coverage to Codecov.
